heading: Prohibition on waiver of rights
label: 5421 Prohibition on waiver of rights
text: The rights afforded manufactured home purchasers under this chapter may not be waived, and any provision of a contract or agreement entered into after , to the contrary shall be void.August 22, 1974
notes: Amendments1980— substituted “manufactured home” for “mobile home”.Pub. L. 96–399
Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of 180 days following , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 22, 1974section 627 of Pub. L. 93–383section 5401 of this title
amendments: Amendments1980— substituted “manufactured home” for “mobile home”.Pub. L. 96–399
